channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: NIH Invites Input on a Revised Clinical Trial Application Form to Reduce Burden and Enhance Review
item.description: We invite input by April 17, 2026 on a Proposed Clinical Trial-Specific Application Form for investigator-initiated clinical trials.

item.title: 2026 Extramural Community Days: Securing NIH Controlled-Access Data
item.description: NIH invites the extramural research community to attend a two-part virtual event focused on security expectations and best practices for protecting NIH controlled-access data.

item.title: AutoDIDACTS
item.description: DSO is soliciting innovative proposals for the data-informed development of generalizable models and principles for aeronautical design and the optimal control of turbulent systems. | See Program

item.title: Does Good Clinical Practice (GCP) Training Consistent with the International Conference on Harmonisation (ICH) E6 (R3) Meet the NIH Requirement?
item.description: Yes. GCP training consistent with ICH E6 (R3) meets the requirement stated in the NIH Grants Policy Statement (GPS).

item.title: Request for Information (RFI): Inviting Input on Future Directions for a Somatic Mosaicism Common Fund Program
item.description: Notice NOT-RM-26-003 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Update of NIH Late Application Submission Policy and End of Continuous Submission
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-064 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Change: NIDCD Expiration of PAR-25-445, "NIDCD Clinical Research Center Grant (P50 Clinical Trial Optional)"
item.description: Notice NOT-DC-26-004 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Change: NINDS Expiration of PA-25-150: Joint NINDS/NIMH Exploratory Neuroscience Research Grant (R21) Clinical Trial Not Allowed)
item.description: Notice NOT-NS-26-007 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts
